name: PER_ORG_TREE_NODE_V
query: ( SELECT TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE, TREE_CODE, TREE_VERSION_ID, TREE_NODE_ID, PARENT_TREE_NODE_ID, DATA_SOURCE_ID, TO_NUMBER(PK1_START_VALUE) ORGANIZATION_ID, TO_DATE(PK2_START_VALUE,'YYYY-MM-DD') EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, TO_DATE(PK3_START_VALUE,'YYYY-MM-DD') EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, REFERENCE_TREE_CODE, REFERENCE_TREE_VERSION_ID, TREE_LABEL_ID, PARENT_DATA_SOURCE_ID, TO_NUMBER(PARENT_PK1_VALUE) PARENT_ORGANIZATION_ID, TO_DATE(PARENT_PK2_VALUE,'YYYY-MM-DD') PARENT_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, TO_DATE(PARENT_PK3_VALUE,'YYYY-MM-DD') PARENT_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, PARENT_TREE_LABEL_ID, SORT_ORDER, DEPTH, CHILD_COUNT, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM PER_ORG_TREE_NODE )
